positive: Stylized illustration of a magical nocturnal forest clearing, featuring bioluminescent fauna and flora. A central, abstractly rendered fox silhouette sits amidst giant glowing mushrooms and ferns. The scene should have a deep indigo and sapphire blue color palette, accented by vibrant neon teal and electric violet highlights. Strong, dramatic contrast is essential, emphasizing crisp edges and clean silhouettes against a cosmic-night sky background. Minimalist yet detailed, suitable for screen printing on apparel, highly symmetrical, central composition, vector art quality, elegant, fantasy illustration, concept art.
